name: Familiar-Possessed - Wynn
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>憑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>依</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>着</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ウィン
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand or Deck) by sending 1 face-up "Wynn the Wind Charmer" and 1 face-up WIND monster you control to the GY. If this card Special Summoned by its effect attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand or Deck) by sending 1 face-up "Wynn the Wind Charmer" and 1 face-up WIND monster you control to the GY. If this card Special Summoned by its effect attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand or Deck) by sending 1 face-up "Wynn the Wind Charmer" and 1 face-up WIND monster you control to the GY. If this card Special Summoned by its effect attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.
